svg.title: Synalux POS — catering
svg.desc: Synalux POS mockup screen for catering. All UI elements admin-configurable.
svg.text: Dessert: Wedding cake (client) + mini dessert display
Bar: Open bar 6-9 PM . Cash bar 9-11 PM
Dietary: 4 gluten-free . 2 nut allergy . 1 vegan -- alerts set
pos_events: id, venue_id, name, event_date, start_time, end_time, room_id, guest_count, event_type, contact jsonb, coordinator_staff_id, status (quote|confirmed|complete|cancelled)

pos_event_financials: event_id, package_price, room_rental, service_charge_pct, deposit_pct, deposit_paid_cents, balance_due_cents . pos_event_menus: event_id, course, selections jsonb, dietary_flags jsonb
pos_event_staff: event_id, staff_id, role . Deposit flow: pos_payments (type='deposit', event_id FK) . BEO: PDF generated /api/pos/events/[id]/beo.pdf . pos_invoices linked event_id

KDS on event day: event orders fire with event_id tag -- kitchen sees event context . Final invoice: pos_invoices -> event_id . pos_event_staff: event_id, staff_id, role (server|bartender|coordinator|kitchen)
pos_payments (type='deposit', event_id FK) . Gratuity settle: pos_event_gratuity . Automate balance reminder: pos_notifications (event_id, trigger_days_before, type='balance_due')
pending = o . complete = check . ! = action needed
